_comment_trees: Megascans trees: add paths from Content/Environments/. Right-click asset -> Copy Reference, paste here. Leave empty for placeholder.
_comment_rocks: Optional rocks (second spawner): add paths for rock meshes. Leave empty to skip.
_comment_height: Optional: set height_filter_min and height_filter_max (world Z in cm) to spawn only on terrain. E.g. -5000 to 5000. Leave null to skip.
